what_optimised: BASELINE MEASURED: naive pre-optimisation path (fresh HMAC + SDK call + json.loads per iteration); 500 iterations (50 warmup); fixed node + session nonce representing FL round re-attestation workload
OPTIMISED PATH: all 6 optimisations applied (session pool, pre-serialised bytes, batch parallel, lazy init, TTL memoisation, hot-path JSON elimination)
results: Mean latency BEFORE: 51.78 µs  →  AFTER: 10.13 µs  (−80.4%)
P99  latency BEFORE: 81.57 µs  →  AFTER: 19.46 µs  (−76.3%)
Memory overhead: ~0 KB (negligible);  CPU overhead: +3.4 µs/call
Sub-operation profiles: HMAC-SHA256 sign, TPM quote (cached), PCR verify (memo), SDK attest (disabled), SDK attest (full opt)
Batch scaling: sequential naive vs parallel opt across 1/2/4/8/16/32/64 nodes
Convergence curves: rolling throughput, stable TP, convergence iteration
